title: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed
description: On pages 22–24, this part focuses on the enemy’s trick is exposed, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed. Usopp and Chopper endure brutal attacks and keep fighting for Luffy, Vivi, and the crew’s promise. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I understand... So it doesn't matter if I transform into her,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Or any of your other friends... None of it would work on you.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: You're right! The princess really is back!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: But why now of all times...!?

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: Then Alabama will come to an end?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The Kingdom of Alabasta is its people, fighting each other as we speak!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It is their very existence which allows Alabama to be a kingdom, not the other way around!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If we could just stop the fighting for even a few seconds...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just a few seconds to draw everyone's attention... That's all I need!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just leave what comes after to me!

summary: This part develops the enemy’s trick is exposed and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
